name: triage filter rejects a PR with fewer than two substantive review comments per architecture threshold
command: printf '{"number":1,"merged":true,"author_type":"User","docs_only":false,"substantive_comments":1,"reviewer_requested_changes":false,"iterative_pushes":0}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/triage.sh" --pr pr.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=reject' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=insufficient-comments' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
